summary: T-Mobile subscriber live FGotD in market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a T-Mobile subscriber
AND there is a FGotD scheduled or in-progress in the viewing market of the user
AND/OR the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user views the FGotD game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay
AND the FGotD pill does not display in the game tile
